mapper.insert: insert into community_payment ( user_id, user_name, user_room, payment_type, payment_amount, payment_status, payment_no, payment_time, overdue_amount, due_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark ) values ( #{userId}, #{userName}, #{userRoom}, #{paymentType}, #{paymentAmount}, #{paymentStatus}, #{paymentNo}, #{paymentTime}, #{overdueAmount}, #{dueTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark} )
mapper.update: update community_payment set user_id = #{userId}, user_name = #{userName}, user_room = #{userRoom}, payment_type = #{paymentType}, payment_amount = #{paymentAmount}, payment_status = #{paymentStatus}, payment_no = #{paymentNo}, payment_time = #{paymentTime}, overdue_amount = #{overdueAmount}, due_time = #{dueTime}, create_by = #{createBy}, create_time = #{createTime}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime}, remark = #{remark} where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from community_payment where id in
#{id}
